title: onosma euboica
intro: Onosma euboica, also known as the Euboean onosma, is a flowering plant species within the Apocynaceae family, native to Greece. It possesses medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of onosmin, a toxic alkaloid with reported anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Onosma euboica include its potential in treating various conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are used in traditional medicine, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
